title: Shareable board from templates
excerpt:
If I create a new board without a template, there is a dialog that has an option for shareable. 
If I go into templates, it does not seem like I can make it shareable. 
Am I missing anything here? 
thanks

posts.author: rockyba (rocky ba)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I create a new board without a template, there is a dialog that has an option for shareable.
If I go into templates, it does not seem like I can make it shareable.
Am I missing anything here?

thanks

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: A template is a public board by definition. When you create a board out of that template you can choose to create a public, private or shareable board.
